step_rationale: Fatty-acid β-oxidation intermediate; elevated with metformin and associated with prognosis.
mechanism: Decenoylcarnitine accumulation indicates dysregulated myocardial fatty-acid oxidation and ischemic metabolic stress.

references.title: Long-term Metformin Alters Gut Microbiota and Serum Metabolome in Coronary Artery Disease Patients After Percutaneous Coronary Intervention to Improve 5-year Prognoses: A Multi-omics Analysis.
